businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker pivoting to a 'Physical AI Platform' spanning robotaxis, humanoid robots, and energy storage
businessSummary.description: Tesla is rapidly transforming from an EV manufacturer into an integrated AI, robotics, and energy platform company. FY2025 revenue was $94.8B, marking its first-ever annual revenue decline (-2.9%), with net income plunging 46.5%. On 3/3, US-Israel joint strikes on Iran and the Strait of Hormuz blockade triggered a broad sell-off in growth stocks, pushing TSLA down -2.7%. Rising oil prices have simultaneously sparked discussion about EV's relative attractiveness. Cybertruck AWD explosive demand, FSD transfer 3/31 deadline, and 2026 Model 3 upgrade leaks continue. P/E 364.71x, Forward P/E 149.62x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Vehicle Sales: ~73% of revenue ($69.5B). Model 3/Y core, Model S/X discontinuing Q2 2026
Energy: ~14% of revenue ($12.8B, +27% YoY). Megapack utility-scale storage
Services/Other: ~13% of revenue ($12.5B). Supercharger network, insurance, maintenance
FSD Subscription: $99/month autonomous driving software (subscription-only since Feb 2026)
keyProducts: Cybertruck (New base AWD with explosive demand, deliveries pushed to 2027)
Optimus (Humanoid robot, Fremont factory conversion underway)
Megapack (Utility-scale energy storage, Megapack 3 and Mega Block launching 2026)

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely elevated due to earnings decline. Reflects AI/robotaxi premium

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $2.62 forecast. Still in overvalued territory

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth
keyMetrics.interpretation: First-ever annual revenue decline. FY2026 +11.25% rebound expected

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Down from 7.84% in FY2024. Price competition and R&D expansion impact

keyMetrics.name: ROE
keyMetrics.interpretation: Declined sharply with earnings. Down from 7.84% in FY2024

keyMetrics.name: Gross Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Slight improvement from FY2024's 17.86%. Holding up despite China price war

growthDrivers.title: Oil Price Surge → Potential EV Attractiveness Boost
growthDrivers.description: Iran-Hormuz blockade driving oil prices higher. Rising gasoline costs could accelerate EV adoption.

growthDrivers.title: Cybertruck New Base AWD Explosive Demand — Deliveries Pushed to 2027
growthDrivers.description: Tesla's new base trim saw such strong demand that delivery timelines were pushed to 2027.

growthDrivers.title: France & Norway Market Share Rebounds in February
growthDrivers.description: Per Reuters, Tesla regained market share in France and Norway in February. First stabilization after two years of European decline.

growthDrivers.title: FSD Transfer Policy Change — March 31 Deadline
growthDrivers.description: Tesla changed FSD transfer policy requiring delivery by 3/31. Expected to drive Q1 purchase acceleration.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 50%+ US EV market share leader. Globally overtaken by BYD. Software, manufacturing, energy vertical integration and 8.2B autonomous driving miles are the core moats.

moats.description: FSD Supervised 8.2 billion miles. Overwhelming training dataset vs. competitors.
In-house battery (4680), custom chips (HW4), software (FSD), charging infrastructure (Supercharger).
NACS is the North American EV charging standard. GM, Ford, Rivian rely on Tesla's Supercharger network.

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: 2025 global EV sales leader. Surging in Europe, tariffs limiting US entry

competitors.name: Rivian (RIVN)
competitors.detail: R2 SUV ($45,000) launching 2026, directly competing with Model Y

competitors.name: Xiaomi
competitors.detail: YU7 SUV outselling Model Y 2:1 in China

recentNews.headline: US-Israel Strikes on Iran, Strait of Hormuz Blockade — Global Markets Rocked
recentNews.significance: Iran's Hormuz blockade sent oil prices surging, triggering broad risk-off selling. TSLA -2.7%. Dow recovered 800 points. Rising oil may boost EV narrative.

recentNews.headline: Tesla Gains Market Share in France and Norway in February
recentNews.significance: First stabilization signal after two years of European decline.

recentNews.headline: Cybertruck $59,990 Base Trim Gone — New Base Sees Explosive Demand, 2027 Delivery
recentNews.significance: Strong demand pushed delivery timelines to 2027.

recentNews.headline: Tesla Changes FSD Transfer Policy — March 31 Deadline
recentNews.significance: FSD transfer deadline set to 3/31, creating Q1 purchase acceleration.

recentNews.headline: 2026 Model 3 Major Interior Upgrades Leaked (EU/APAC)
recentNews.significance: New screen and headliner borrowed from Model Y.

analystOpinions.notableComment: 40 analysts, Hold consensus. MarketBeat avg $408.09. Dan Ives (Wedbush) $600 high, GLJ Research $25 low. Robotaxi optimism persists despite tariff/geopolitical risks.

risks.title: Iran-Hormuz Blockade — Geopolitical Risk Surge
risks.description: 20-30% of global oil passes through Hormuz. Oil surge may reignite inflation, delay rate cuts, compress growth multiples.

risks.title: P/E 364.71x — Extreme Overvaluation
risks.description: Forward P/E 149.62x still extremely expensive. EPS $1.08, down 47% YoY.

risks.title: Europe 13 Consecutive Months of Sales Decline
risks.description: 13 straight months through January. BYD +165% widening gap.

risks.title: China Competition — Xiaomi and BYD
risks.description: Xiaomi YU7 outselling Model Y 2:1. BYD low-cost EVs eroding share.

risks.title: Musk Political Risk — DOGE, European Backlash
risks.description: Musk's DOGE involvement fueling consumer defection in Europe and parts of the US.

buyReasons.title: Oil Surge → EV Adoption Catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Hormuz blockade pushing oil prices higher. Higher gasoline costs improve EV economics.

buyReasons.title: Cybertruck Demand Explosion
buyReasons.rationale: New base trim demand pushed deliveries to 2027. Strategy validated.

buyReasons.title: Robotaxi & AI Platform — Cybercab Production Starting
buyReasons.rationale: Cybercab full production April, H1 robotaxi expansion to 9 cities.

buyReasons.title: Energy Business High Growth — Megapack 3 Imminent
buyReasons.rationale: Energy revenue $12.8B (+27% YoY). Megapack 3 and Mega Block launching 2026.

overallOpinion: Mar 3 close $392.50 (-2.7%). US-Israel Iran strikes and Hormuz blockade triggered global sell-off. Growth stocks used as funding source for defensive positions.
40 analysts, Hold consensus. Avg target $408 (+4%). Dan Ives $600 vs GLJ $25. Forward P/E 149.62x, RSI 37.09 approaching oversold.
Trading just above 200-day MA $391. RSI 37 near oversold. Break below $391 risks further decline; holding support could trigger technical bounce. Geopolitical resolution is key.

sources.name: Reuters
sources.description: Iran-Israel military conflict, Hormuz blockade live

sources.name: Reuters
sources.description: Tesla France & Norway February market share rebound

sources.name: Autoblog
sources.description: Cybertruck base trim gone, demand explosion

threads.hook: TSLA $392, Iran war drags it -2.7% — but oil surge bullish for EVs?
threads.text: $TSLA (3/4) Iran Hormuz blockade triggers market panic, growth stock sell-off at -2.7%. Sitting right on 200-day MA $391, RSI 37 near oversold. But if oil keeps surging, doesn't EV adoption accelerate? Cybertruck sold out to 2027. Fear = opportunity? investory.kro.kr/stock/TSLA/analysis/2026-03-04
